race.comment: Doomben will host the 9 race Metro card in Queensland this weekend, which includes the Group 1 Doomben 10000 over 1200m. The first is a class 6 Handicap worth 85K over 1350m. MIDNIGHT DYNAMITE (2) won by a nose fresh up at Randwick 3 weeks ago, and he is just as sharp second up. JMac has picked up the ride, and he is set to repeat. TRUE TO FORM (7) finished runner-up at Eagle Farm in a similar field to this 4 weeks ago, and he maps to receive a cosy run early on here. As long as the ground is not too wet, he can go one better. BUNKER HUT (1) is a consistent gelding who may not win often, but he has won his only start on this track. His last run was 6 weeks ago, and he can be relied upon to run his usual honest effort. COSMO CENTAURUS (4) will be chasing a hat-trick of wins, and he has the services of Zac Purton which is always a bonus. He climbs in weight but can still get the job done. EXPRESS PAYMENT (8) strips fitter and has a good draw. Include.
